chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc: application No.S-138 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For Non-prosecution 14.07.2025 Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, Deputy Prosecutor General...-..-...-..-..-..-..-..- Today, the matter was fixed for non-prosecution. Earlier, on 05.06.2025, no one appeared on behalf of the applicant, nor was any intimation received. As a matter of indulgence, the case was fixed for today. However, once again, no one has appeared on behalf of the applicant. Therefore, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
